items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT (n=30) found that a novel dynamic wrist-hand stretching device, Hand Stretcher®, significantly improved flexor spasticity and increased wrist range of motion in chronic stroke patients with mild-to-moderate spasticity over 8 weeks compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: 新型动态腕手牵伸装置有望改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛。这项小型 RCT 提示，对于轻中度痉挛的患者，该装置可有效降低 MAS 评分和提高 ROM，为传统手动牵伸提供了辅助方案。
items.titleZh: 动态腕手牵伸装置改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：一项试点随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项试点随机对照试验（n=30）发现，与对照组相比，Hand Stretcher® 动态腕手牵伸装置在 8 周内显著改善了慢性卒中轻中度痉挛患者的屈肌痉挛并增加了腕关节活动度。
items.curatedReasonEn: A novel dynamic wrist-hand stretching device shows promise in improving flexor spasticity in chronic stroke patients. This small RCT suggests that for patients with mild-to-moderate spasticity, the device effectively reduces MAS scores and increases ROM, offering an adjunctive option to traditional manual stretching.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的试点研究，样本量较小，长期疗效和更广泛人群的适用性尚待大型 RCT 验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary pilot study with a small sample size; long-term efficacy and applicability to a broader population require validation through larger RCTs.

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: This meta-analysis evaluated the short-term and long-term therapeutic effects of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease, identifying stimulation site, coil type, and stimulation frequency as key modulating factors.
items.curatedReason: 这篇荟萃分析再次确认了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病运动功能的短期改善作用。刺激部位（如运动皮层）和高频刺激是关键调节因素，临床实践中可作为优化 rTMS 方案的参考。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病运动功能疗效及调节因素的荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项荟萃分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病患者运动功能的短期和长期治疗效果，并确定了刺激部位、线圈类型和刺激频率是关键的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis reconfirms the short-term motor function improvement of rTMS in Parkinson's disease. Stimulation site (e.g., motor cortex) and high-frequency stimulation are key modulating factors that can guide optimization of rTMS protocols in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析纳入的原始研究异质性可能较高，且主要评估短期效应，长期疗效和不同 rTMS 方案的最佳组合仍需更多高质量研究。
items.limitationEn: The included studies in this meta-analysis may have high heterogeneity, and mainly evaluated short-term effects; long-term efficacy and optimal combinations of different rTMS protocols still require more high-quality research.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review established weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury by analyzing studies from PubMed, Sportdiscuss, WOS, and Scielo databases, aiming to address the high recurrence rate due to lack of consensus.
items.curatedReason: 膕绳肌损伤后的重返运动标准缺乏共识，导致高复发率。这篇系统综述试图建立加权标准，作为临床指导，你可以在制定或调整重返运动方案时参考其中的证据质量分析，以降低患者再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 膕绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准建立：一项系统综述和方法学质量分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述通过分析 PubMed、Sportdiscuss、WOS 和 Scielo 数据库的研究，建立了膕绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准，旨在解决因缺乏共识导致的高复发率问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Lack of consensus on return-to-play criteria after hamstring injury contributes to high recurrence rates. This systematic review aims to establish weighted criteria as clinical guidance. You can refer to its evidence quality analysis when developing or adjusting return-to-play protocols to reduce patient re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 本系统综述发现现有研究方法学质量差异大，且缺乏统一的重返运动标准，提示仍需更多高质量研究来确立最佳实践。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review found significant heterogeneity in methodological quality among existing studies and a lack of unified return-to-play criteria, indicating a need for more high-quality research to establish best practices.

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the expectations and experiences of hip or knee osteoarthritis patients regarding physical therapist-led triage in a Swedish orthopedic clinic, finding that while care quality was perceived as good, patient participation in decision-making and fulfillment of assessment expectations were lower.
items.curatedReason: 骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导的分诊（PT-led triage）期望值高，但对决策参与度和评估满足度较低。这意味着即便 PT 主导分诊能提高就诊可及性，患者体验设计也需优化，不能只关注诊疗结果。
items.titleZh: 膝髋骨关节炎患者对二级护理中物理治疗师主导分诊的期望与体验
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了瑞典骨科诊所中，膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验。研究发现，虽然患者认为护理质量良好，但他们在决策参与度和评估期望满足度方面较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients with OA have high expectations for PT-led triage, but report lower satisfaction with decision-making participation and assessment fulfillment. This suggests that while PT-led triage improves access, patient experience design needs optimization beyond just clinical outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究采用探索性定性设计，样本量小，结果的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This study used an exploratory qualitative design with a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (N=140) found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity (6-min walk test distance) and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity at 6 months compared to usual care in individuals with TIA or mild stroke.
items.curatedReason: 针对短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）或轻度卒中患者的综合心血管康复项目，在 6 个月内能显著改善功能性运动能力和身体活动水平。将心血管康复纳入 TIA 和轻度卒中患者的常规管理方案，可作为一项核心推荐。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验（N=140）发现，对于短暂性脑缺血发作或轻度卒中患者，为期 6 周的心血管康复项目在 6 个月时显著改善了功能性运动能力（6 分钟步行距离）和中高强度身体活动，优于常规护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation programs for individuals with transient ischaemic attack (TIA) or mild stroke significantly improve functional exercise capacity and physical activity over 6 months. Incorporating cardiovascular rehabilitation into routine management for TIA and mild stroke patients should be a core recommendation.
items.limitation: 研究排除了有严重合并症或沟通障碍的患者，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study excluded patients with severe comorbidities or communication difficulties, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: This decision analytic model evaluated stroke survivors discharged to IRFs vs. SNFs from a US healthcare payer perspective, finding IRFs to be more cost-effective over 90 days despite higher initial costs, due to lower mortality and disability and higher community discharge rates.
items.curatedReason: 从美国医保支付方角度看，卒中后急性期康复，入住住院康复机构（IRF）比技能护理机构（SNF）更具成本效益，虽然初始成本更高，但能带来更好的临床结果。在为卒中患者推荐转诊机构时，优先考虑 IRF，并向支付方强调其长期效益。
items.titleZh: 从美国医疗支付方角度看卒中急性期后康复的成本效益：住院康复机构与技能护理机构的比较
items.summaryZh: 这项决策分析模型从美国医疗支付方角度评估了卒中幸存者出院后入住住院康复机构（IRF）与技能护理机构（SNF）的成本效益，发现 IRF 尽管初始成本较高，但在 90 天内更具成本效益，因其死亡率和残疾率较低，社区出院率较高。
items.curatedReasonEn: From a US healthcare payer perspective, post-acute stroke rehabilitation at Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) is more cost-effective than at Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs), despite higher initial costs, due to superior clinical outcomes. When recommending referrals for stroke patients, prioritize IRFs and emphasize their long-term benefits to payers.
items.limitation: 本研究采用决策分析模型进行模拟，结果依赖于模型参数的准确性。
items.limitationEn: This study used a decision analytic model for simulation, and the results depend on the accuracy of the model parameters.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: This quasi-experimental study (N=72) demonstrated that a 12-week exergaming intervention using Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure significantly improved physical, psychological (e.g., depression, cognitive function), and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: 在机构养老的老年肌少症患者中，12 周的体感游戏（exergaming）干预能同时改善其身体、心理和社交功能。你可以在养老机构积极推广体感游戏，作为综合肌少症管理方案的一部分。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏对机构养老老年肌少症患者的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局
items.summaryZh: 这项准实验研究（N=72）表明，在机构养老的肌少症老年人中，使用 Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure 进行的 12 周体感游戏干预显著改善了身体、心理（如抑郁、认知功能）和社交结局，优于对照组。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week exergaming intervention simultaneously improves physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia. You can actively promote exergaming in long-term care facilities as part of a comprehensive sarcopenia management program.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验设计，而非随机对照试验，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was a quasi-experimental study, not an RCT, which may introduce selection bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: [Correspondence] Make rehabilitation count: invest in people, not just devices
items.summary: This correspondence highlights the WHO's global rehabilitation indicators and urges a shift in focus from device-centric investment to human resources and sustainable development to ensure rehabilitation access for all.
items.curatedReason: 世界卫生组织（WHO）的全球康复指标强调康复是医疗保健不可或缺的一部分，而不仅仅是辅助项目。在倡导康复时，你应该将关注点从单纯的设备投资转向人才培养和可持续发展，以确保康复服务的可及性。
items.titleZh: 让康复发挥作用：投资于人，而非仅仅设备
items.summaryZh: 这篇通讯强调了世卫组织的全球康复指标，并敦促将重点从以设备为中心的投资转向人力资源和可持续发展，以确保所有人都能获得康复服务。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WHO's global rehabilitation indicators emphasize rehabilitation as an integral part of healthcare, not merely an add-on. When advocating for rehabilitation, you should shift focus from solely investing in devices to developing human resources and ensuring sustainable access to rehabilitation services.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that lower physical activity levels were significantly associated with worse functional capacity, more musculoskeletal symptoms, and higher perceived barriers. Individuals with low physical activity had greater functional limitations and symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 肥胖女性的膝关节症状、功能受限和疲劳与身体活动水平呈负相关。在临床实践中，你需要全面评估这些共病因素，并制定个体化的干预策略来提高患者的身体活动水平。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的身体活动：疲劳、膝关节症状与功能能力的关系
items.summaryZh: 这项对 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究发现，较低的身体活动水平与较差的功能能力、更多的肌肉骨骼症状以及更高的感知障碍显著相关。身体活动水平低的个体有更大的功能限制和症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: Knee symptoms, functional limitations, and fatigue are negatively associated with physical activity levels in women with obesity. In clinical practice, you need to comprehensively assess these comorbidities and develop individualized intervention strategies to improve patients' physical activity.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且依赖自我报告的身体活动问卷。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality and relies on self-reported physical activity questionnaires.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Feasibility of applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context.
items.summary: This feasibility study in 45 stroke survivors confirmed that the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach is feasible within a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation setting, showing high fidelity and perceived value from participants.
items.curatedReason: CO-OP 方法在丹麦市政神经康复环境中对卒中幸存者的应用是可行的，并表现出积极的效果，值得你进一步探索将其整合到神经康复实践中。
items.titleZh: 在丹麦市政神经康复环境中应用日常职业表现认知导向（CO-OP）方法的可行性
items.summaryZh: 这项对 45 名卒中幸存者的可行性研究证实，日常职业表现认知导向（CO-OP）方法在丹麦市政神经康复环境中是可行的，并显示出高依从性和参与者的良好感知价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: The application of the CO-OP approach for stroke survivors in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context is feasible and shows positive effects. You should further explore integrating it into your neurorehabilitation practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为单组前测-后测设计，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的明确疗效。
items.limitationEn: This study used a single-group pretest-posttest design without a control group, which limits the ability to definitively assess intervention efficacy.

items.title: Blood pressure levels and clinically meaningful changes during inpatient rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: insights from the Dutch Spinal Cord Injury Database.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study of 1286 SCI individuals in inpatient rehabilitation found higher admission systolic and diastolic BP associated with higher BMI, lower neurological lesion level, and motor incomplete SCI. Clinically meaningful BP changes were determined by demographic and injury characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤患者在住院康复期间的血压和心率变化及其决定因素值得关注。对于你日常管理 SCI 患者时，应持续监测血压，尤其留意体重指数、神经损伤水平和药物等因素对血压的影响。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤住院康复期间的血压水平和临床意义变化：来自荷兰脊髓损伤数据库的见解
items.summaryZh: 这项对 1286 名脊髓损伤住院康复患者的回顾性队列研究发现，入院时较高的收缩压和舒张压与较高的体重指数、较低的神经损伤水平以及运动不完全性脊髓损伤相关。血压的临床意义变化由人口学和损伤特征决定。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood pressure and heart rate changes and their determinants during inpatient rehabilitation for spinal cord injury patients warrant attention. In your daily management of SCI patients, continuously monitor blood pressure, especially considering the influence of BMI, neurological lesion level, and medication.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在数据缺失和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study, which may be subject to missing data and confounding factors.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This perspective highlights the growing prevalence of hip OA in young adults and emphasizes the importance of early diagnosis and intervention to potentially alter its trajectory, drawing parallels with efforts in knee OA.
items.curatedReason: 早期诊断和干预髋骨关节炎（OA）至关重要。你需要提高对年轻患者早期髋关节 OA 的识别和治疗意识，以便及时进行干预，改变疾病进程，这在临床实践中往往被忽视。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋骨关节炎：一个干预的窗口期
items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章强调了髋骨关节炎在年轻成人中日益增长的流行率，并强调了早期诊断和干预的重要性，以期改变其疾病进程，同时与膝骨关节炎的干预措施进行对比。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early diagnosis and intervention for hip osteoarthritis (OA) are crucial. You need to increase awareness of identifying and treating early-stage hip OA in younger adults to intervene promptly and alter the disease trajectory, which is often overlooked in clinical practice.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summary: This study investigated the changes and temporal trends in intrinsic capacity across 32 countries, aiming to enhance the understanding of healthy aging and inform strategies for improving intrinsic capacity in diverse populations.
items.curatedReason: 内在能力（intrinsic capacity）是促进健康老龄化的关键目标。你应关注各国内在能力的变化趋势，这将帮助你了解特定人群的老龄化健康状况，并调整康复策略以提高患者的内在能力。
items.titleZh: 内在能力趋势：来自 32 个国家的证据
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了 32 个国家内在能力的变化和时间趋势，旨在增进对健康老龄化的理解，并为改善不同人群内在能力的策略提供信息。
items.curatedReasonEn: Intrinsic capacity is a key goal in promoting healthy aging. You should pay attention to trends in intrinsic capacity across countries, as this will help you understand the health status of aging populations and adapt rehabilitation strategies to improve patients' intrinsic capacity.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Sociodemographic Determinants of Food Insecurity and Its Association with BMI in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury: A Cross-Sectional Analysis from the All of Us Research Program
items.summary: This cross-sectional study compared the prevalence of food insecurity and its association with BMI in individuals with spinal cord injury versus a matched control cohort, identifying sociodemographic determinants.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤（SCI）患者食物不安全的流行率及其与 BMI 的关联值得关注。你在评估 SCI 患者时，需要考虑社会经济因素，识别食物不安全风险，并转诊至相关社会服务以解决患者的营养和健康问题。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者食物不安全的社会人口学决定因素及其与 BMI 的关联：来自“我们所有人研究项目”的横断面分析
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究比较了脊髓损伤患者与匹配的无残疾对照组食物不安全的流行率及其与 BMI 的关联，并确定了社会人口学决定因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: The prevalence of food insecurity in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) and its association with BMI warrant attention. When assessing SCI patients, you need to consider socioeconomic factors, identify food insecurity risks, and refer to relevant social services to address patients' nutritional and health issues.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面分析，无法建立食物不安全与 BMI 之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional analysis cannot establish causality between food insecurity and BMI.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Correlates of Loneliness in Persons with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: This study examines the correlates of loneliness in persons with spinal cord injury, highlighting that mobility impairments can exacerbate feelings of isolation and contribute to loneliness.
items.curatedReason: 孤独感在脊髓损伤（SCI）患者中可能更为普遍，并影响其康复。你在评估和制定康复计划时，除了生理功能，也应积极筛查患者的心理社会需求，并提供支持来减少孤独感。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者孤独感的关联因素
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了脊髓损伤患者孤独感的关联因素，强调行动障碍可能加剧隔离感并导致孤独。
items.curatedReasonEn: Loneliness may be more prevalent in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) and can affect their rehabilitation. When assessing and developing rehabilitation plans, you should actively screen for patients' psychosocial needs in addition to physiological function and provide support to reduce loneliness.
items.limitation: 本研究标题未提供具体研究设计和样本量，可能无法充分评估证据强度。
items.limitationEn: The title of this study does not provide specific study design and sample size, which may limit the assessment of evidence strength.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Time to monitor the mental health of esports athletes
items.summary: This editorial calls on sports medicine and public health stakeholders to seriously address the mental health of esports athletes, following the International Olympic Committee's announcement of the Olympic Esports Games, recognizing esports as a legitimate high-performance context.
items.curatedReason: 随着电竞运动获得国际奥委会的官方认可，电竞运动员的心理健康问题将日益突出。你作为运动康复从业者，应该开始关注这一新兴群体，理解他们的运动损伤和心理健康挑战，并为他们提供相应的康复服务。
items.titleZh: 是时候关注电竞运动员的心理健康了
items.summaryZh: 国际奥委会宣布举办奥林匹克电竞运动会后，这篇社论呼吁运动医学和公共卫生利益相关者认真对待电竞运动员的心理健康问题，承认电竞是一个合法的高水平竞技环境。
items.curatedReasonEn: With esports gaining official recognition from the IOC, mental health issues among esports athletes will become increasingly prominent. As a sports rehabilitation practitioner, you should start paying attention to this emerging population, understand their athletic injuries and mental health challenges, and provide corresponding rehabilitation services.

items.title: Period pain in female athletes: a call to action - time to fill the evidence gap and develop tailored management pathways
items.summary: This editorial highlights the high prevalence of primary dysmenorrhea (period pain) in female athletes (60%) and its negative impact on performance, calling for more research and tailored management pathways due to a significant evidence gap.
items.curatedReason: 原发性痛经在全球女性运动员中普遍存在，且严重影响其运动表现和生活质量。你需要认识到这一"证据空白"，并积极与运动队、医生协作，为女性运动员制定量身定制的痛经管理方案，弥补现有临床路径的不足。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员痛经：一项行动呼吁——是时候填补证据空白并制定量身定制的管理路径了
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论强调了原发性痛经（经期疼痛）在女性运动员中（60%）的高流行率及其对表现的负面影响，呼吁进行更多研究并制定量身定制的管理路径，因为存在显著的证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: Primary dysmenorrhea is prevalent among female athletes worldwide and significantly impacts their athletic performance and quality of life. You need to recognize this "evidence gap" and actively collaborate with sports teams and physicians to develop tailored pain management pathways for female athletes, addressing the shortcomings of existing clinical approaches.

items.title: Planting the seeds of power: paediatric powerpenia as a lifecourse research priority
items.summary: This editorial introduces "paediatric powerpenia" as a critical, modifiable risk factor for lifelong musculoskeletal health, advocating for a shift in research priority to the early prevention of low muscular power in children, similar to sarcopenia.
items.curatedReason: “儿童期肌力减退”（paediatric powerpenia）被提出作为影响终生肌肉骨骼健康的风险因素。你需要将关注点从老年肌少症扩展到儿童期肌力不足的早期预防，这将改变你对儿童运动发育评估和干预的视角。
items.titleZh: 播下力量的种子：将儿童期肌力减退作为生命历程研究的优先事项
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提出了“儿童期肌力减退”是影响终生肌肉骨骼健康的关键、可干预的风险因素，主张将研究重点转向儿童期低肌肉力量的早期预防，类似于肌少症的预防。
items.curatedReasonEn: The concept of "paediatric powerpenia" is proposed as a lifelong risk factor for musculoskeletal health. You need to expand your focus from sarcopenia in older adults to early prevention of muscle power deficits in children, which will change your perspective on pediatric motor development assessment and intervention.

items.title: Rehabilitation and outcomes following revision total hip replacement: patients experiences, optimised rehabilitation interventions and opioid use (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: This PhD Academy Award summary outlines research on rehabilitation and opioid use after revision total hip replacement, exploring patient experiences, the effectiveness of targeted hip-strengthening exercise programs, and predictors of persistent opioid use.
items.curatedReason: 髋关节置换术后康复和阿片类药物使用模式的最新研究揭示了患者体验和优化干预措施的潜力。你应该将这些发现整合到你的临床实践中，设计更个体化的康复方案，并注意阿片类药物的潜在长期使用风险。
items.titleZh: 翻修全髋关节置换术后的康复和结局：患者体验、优化康复干预和阿片类药物使用（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 这份博士学院奖摘要概述了翻修全髋关节置换术后康复和阿片类药物使用的研究，探讨了患者体验、针对性髋关节强化锻炼项目的有效性，以及持续性阿片类药物使用的预测因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Recent research on rehabilitation and opioid use patterns following revision total hip replacement reveals the potential for optimizing patient experiences and interventions. You should integrate these findings into your clinical practice to design more individualized rehabilitation programs and be mindful of the potential long-term risks of opioid use.

items.title: Cross-Education Effect on Force Production Capacity After Unilateral Resistance Training in Clinical Populations: A Systematic Review with Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis found that the cross-education effect after unilateral resistance training consistently produces force production gains in the contralateral non-trained muscle across various clinical populations, including those with musculoskeletal conditions and hemiparesis after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析证实了单侧阻力训练后的交叉教育效应在临床人群中普遍存在。这提示你可以在患肢无法完全负重或训练时，通过训练健侧来维持或提高患侧力量。
items.titleZh: 单侧阻力训练后交叉教育效应对临床人群力量产生能力的影响：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，单侧阻力训练后的交叉教育效应在各种临床人群（包括肌肉骨骼疾病和卒中后偏瘫患者）中，能持续提高对侧未训练肌肉的力量产生能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the general presence of the cross-education effect in clinical populations after unilateral resistance training. This suggests you can maintain or enhance strength in an affected limb by training the healthy side when the affected limb cannot fully bear weight or be trained.
items.limitation: 临床人群（包括肌骨疾病和中风偏瘫）中的研究异质性较高，可能影响荟萃分析结果的解释。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity among studies in clinical populations (including musculoskeletal conditions and post-stroke hemiparesis) may affect the interpretation of meta-analysis results.

items.title: The Psychometric Properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale Used After Stroke: A Systematic Review Using COSMIN Methodology.
items.summary: A systematic review using COSMIN methodology evaluated the psychometric properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) in individuals with stroke, providing clarity on its measurement quality and certainty of evidence.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述使用 COSMIN 方法，系统评估了躯干功能障碍量表（TIS）在卒中患者中的心理测量学特性，为你在临床使用 TIS 提供了高质量的证据支持。
items.titleZh: 卒中后躯干功能障碍量表（TIS）心理测量学特性：一项使用 COSMIN 方法的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项使用 COSMIN 方法的系统综述评估了卒中患者躯干功能障碍量表（TIS）的心理测量学特性，明确了其测量质量和证据确定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review, using the COSMIN methodology, systematically evaluated the psychometric properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) in stroke patients, providing high-quality evidence to support your clinical use of the TIS.
items.limitation: 尽管使用了 COSMIN 方法，但仍可能存在纳入研究的方法学质量不一，影响证据的总体确定性。
items.limitationEn: Despite using the COSMIN methodology, methodological quality variations among included studies might still affect the overall certainty of evidence.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [synopsis].
items.summary: This critically appraised paper indicates that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as, and health status more than, center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项评论指出，基于移动端的肺康复与中心肺康复在改善运动能力方面效果相当，但在改善健康状况上更优。这强烈支持你将移动方案纳入 COPD 患者康复选择，尤其是在可及性受限的地区。
items.titleZh: 评论性评估论文：基于移动端的肺康复在改善慢性阻塞性肺疾病运动能力方面与中心肺康复相当，在改善健康状况方面更优
items.summaryZh: 一项评论性评估指出，基于移动端的肺康复在改善慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者的运动能力方面与中心肺康复效果相当，但在改善健康状况方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary indicates that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is as effective as center-based PR for exercise capacity and superior for health status in COPD patients. This strongly supports integrating mobile programs into your rehabilitation options, especially where accessibility is limited.

items.title: Patterns of Outcome Measure Utilization in Stroke Rehabilitation Lower Extremity Trials Conducted in Low-to-Middle versus High-Income Countries.
items.summary: This review (N=1,548 RCTs) found that low-to-middle income countries (LMICs) used more generalized impairment and activities of daily living outcome measures relying on patient observation in stroke rehabilitation lower extremity trials, compared to high-income countries (HICs) that favored direct patient participation measures.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了中低收入国家与高收入国家在卒中下肢康复试验中结局测量工具使用模式的差异。在解读国际文献或参与多中心研究时，你需要注意这些文化和资源背景差异对评估结果的影响。
items.titleZh: 中低收入与高收入国家卒中康复下肢试验中结局测量工具利用模式
items.summaryZh: 这项综述（N=1,548项RCT）发现，中低收入国家（LMICs）在卒中下肢康复试验中，倾向于使用更多依赖患者观察的、普适性功能障碍和日常生活活动结局测量工具，而高收入国家（HICs）则更倾向于直接患者参与的测量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals differences in outcome measure utilization patterns in stroke lower extremity rehabilitation trials between low-to-middle and high-income countries. When interpreting international literature or participating in multi-center studies, you need to be aware of how these cultural and resource differences affect assessment results.
items.limitation: 综述仅涵盖英文发表的 RCT，可能遗漏非英文语种的重要研究，导致结果不完全代表全球情况。
items.limitationEn: The review only includes RCTs published in English, potentially omitting important non-English studies, thus not fully representing the global situation.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Anti-Compensatory Saccades Changes After Visuo-Vestibular Physical Therapy in People With Acute Unilateral Vestibulopathy: A Prospective Observational Study.
items.summary: A prospective observational study (N=92) found that an 8-week structured visuo-vestibular physical therapy program significantly improved anti-compensatory saccades (AcS) in patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy, reflecting vestibulo-saccadic interaction and central compensation.
items.titleZh: 急性单侧前庭病变患者视-前庭物理治疗后反补偿性扫视的变化：一项前瞻性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性观察研究（N=92）发现，为期8周的结构化视-前庭物理治疗项目显著改善了急性单侧前庭病变患者的反补偿性扫视，反映了前庭-眼跳互动及中枢代偿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study suggests that visuo-vestibular physical therapy can improve anti-compensatory saccades in patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy. This provides new assessment and intervention targets for clinical treatment.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，且缺乏对照组，无法排除自愈或其他因素对结果的影响。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, it cannot establish causality and lacks a control group, thus cannot rule out the influence of spontaneous recovery or other factors on the results.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: An exploratory retrospective cohort study (N=333) found that sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion.
items.curatedReason: 肌少症会增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后3年内发生邻近节段退变的风险。在术前评估和术后康复中，应注意肌少症筛查和干预，以降低这种并发症的风险。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后3年内邻近节段退变的风险
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性回顾性队列研究（N=333）发现，肌少症会增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后3年内发生邻近节段退变的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years after anterior cervical discectomy and fusion. During preoperative assessment and postoperative rehabilitation, you should screen for and intervene in sarcopenia to reduce this complication risk.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素，且未直接评估肌少症干预对ASD风险的影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, which may have confounding factors and did not directly assess the impact of sarcopenia interventions on ASD risk.

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis (N=17 trials, 1,372 participants) found that shortwave diathermy significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]; p < .01) and walking ability (mean -0.72; 95% CI [-0.94, -0.50]; p < .01) in knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析确证了短波透热疗法对膝骨关节炎疼痛和步行能力的短期改善作用。在临床中，你可以将其作为非手术治疗方案的有效组成部分。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述与荟萃分析（N=17项试验，1372名参与者）发现，短波透热疗法显著改善了膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（均值 -2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]；p < .01）和步行能力（均值 -0.72；95% CI [-0.94, -0.50]；p < .01）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the short-term benefits of shortwave diathermy for pain and walking ability in knee osteoarthritis. You can effectively integrate it into non-surgical treatment plans in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能较高，且主要评估短期效应，对长期疗效的证据有限。
items.limitationEn: Included studies likely exhibit high heterogeneity, and evidence for long-term efficacy is limited as the review primarily assessed short-term effects.

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found no significant difference in patient-reported outcomes or pain at 2 months and 1 year post-total knee arthroplasty between those who received preoperative physiotherapy and those who did not.
items.curatedReason: 这项大型回顾性队列研究显示，术前物理治疗并未显著改善全膝关节置换术后患者报告结局。在制定临床路径时，优先考虑证据更强的干预措施。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后一年患者报告结局：一项涉及1,688名患者的注册队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对1,688名患者的注册队列研究发现，术前物理治疗并未显著改善初次全膝关节置换术后2个月和1年的患者报告结局或疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large retrospective cohort study indicates that preoperative physiotherapy did not significantly improve patient-reported outcomes after total knee arthroplasty. Prioritize interventions with stronger evidence when developing clinical pathways.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素。患者是否接受术前物理治疗可能受多种未测量因素影响，导致无法确定因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, it is susceptible to selection bias and confounding factors. The decision to undergo preoperative physiotherapy may be influenced by unmeasured variables, precluding causal conclusions.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (N=60) found that therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy similarly improved pain, pressure pain threshold, muscle activity, functional disability, and quality of life in individuals with chronic upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome in the short term.
items.curatedReason: 对于肌筋膜疼痛综合征，治疗性按摩单独使用或与常规物理治疗结合，在短期内均可有效改善疼痛和功能。这支持了将按摩作为多模式干预的一部分。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合常规物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期效应：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=60）显示，治疗性按摩单独使用或与常规物理治疗结合，在短期内可同样有效改善慢性斜方肌肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者的疼痛、压痛阈、肌肉活动、功能障碍和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: For myofascial pain syndrome, therapeutic massage, alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy, effectively improves pain and function in the short term. This supports including massage as part of a multimodal intervention.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了短期效应，缺乏长期随访数据，无法评估干预的长期疗效和维持性。
items.limitationEn: The study only assessed short-term effects and lacked long-term follow-up data, precluding evaluation of the intervention's sustained efficacy.

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored physiotherapists' perceptions of the WalkBack (walking and education) program for low back pain prevention, finding it acceptable but requiring training, flexibility, and system-level enablers for optimal implementation.
items.curatedReason: WalkBack 计划对物理治疗师来说是可接受的，但其广泛实施仍需系统性支持。这意味着你若想推行预防性项目，需要配套的培训、临床流程灵活性和管理层支持。
items.titleZh: WalkBack（步行和教育）腰痛预防项目对物理治疗师来说是可接受的，但其优化实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统级支持：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究发现，WalkBack 腰痛预防项目对物理治疗师而言是可接受的，但其优化实施需要培训、流程灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WalkBack program is acceptable to physiotherapists, but widespread implementation requires systemic support. This means if you aim to implement preventive programs, you'll need accompanying training, clinical workflow flexibility, and management buy-in.
items.limitation: 定性研究，结果基于少数物理治疗师的感知和经验，不具备普遍量化代表性。且主要关注澳大利亚PT的看法，可能不适用于其他地区。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study, with results based on the perceptions and experiences of a few physiotherapists, thus lacking quantitative generalizability. The focus on Australian PTs may not be applicable to other regions.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (N=1350) of patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain found that socio-cultural factors like education level and migration background predict short- and long-term pain intensity, disability, and health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 社会文化因素对非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛的疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量有预测作用。这意味着在评估和管理这类患者时，你不仅要关注生物医学维度，还要深入了解其社会文化背景。
items.titleZh: 预测非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的社会文化因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对1350名非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的前瞻性队列研究发现，教育水平和移民背景等社会文化因素可预测其短期和长期的疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Socio-cultural factors predict pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in non-specific musculoskeletal pain. This means when assessing and managing these patients, you must consider their socio-cultural background in addition to biomedical aspects.
items.limitation: 研究人群集中在荷兰初级保健物理治疗患者，结果的外推性可能受限，不一定适用于其他国家或更复杂病例。
items.limitationEn: The study population is concentrated in Dutch primary care physiotherapy patients, which may limit the generalizability of results to other countries or more complex cases.

items.title: Stroke-specific Movement Patterns During Passage Through a Narrow-Opening: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study classified stroke-specific movement patterns (N=23) when passing through narrow openings, identifying factors associated with these patterns compared to healthy adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究分类了卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特异性运动模式。这提醒你评估患者时应关注其躯干旋转和支撑足调整策略，以指导更具针对性的康复训练。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特异性运动模式：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究分类了23名卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特异性运动模式，并识别了与健康成人相比，这些模式的相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study classified stroke-specific movement patterns when passing through narrow openings. This suggests you should focus on trunk rotation and support foot adjustment strategies during patient assessment to guide more targeted rehabilitation training.
items.limitation: 横断面研究设计，无法建立因果关系，且样本量相对较小，可能影响运动模式分类的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional study design prevents causal inference, and the relatively small sample size may limit the generalizability of movement pattern classifications.

items.title: Self-management in neurological disorders: a scoping review of behavior change theories, strategies, contents, and impact.
items.summary: A scoping review (N=18 studies) identified and mapped behavior change theories, techniques, and effectiveness of self-management interventions for improving functioning outcomes in individuals with neurological conditions, primarily covering stroke, spinal cord injury, and multiple sclerosis.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述提供了神经系统疾病自我管理干预中行为改变理论和技术的概览。它能帮助你更好地设计或评估基于理论的患者自我管理教育方案。
items.titleZh: 神经系统疾病自我管理：一项行为改变理论、策略、内容和影响的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述（N=18项研究）识别并描绘了神经系统疾病患者自我管理干预中，旨在改善功能结局的行为改变理论、技术和有效性，主要涵盖卒中、脊髓损伤和多发性硬化症。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review provides an overview of behavior change theories and techniques in self-management interventions for neurological disorders. It can help you better design or evaluate theory-based patient self-management education programs.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定了其目的在于识别和映射现有证据，而非系统评估干预措施的有效性或质量。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review means its purpose is to identify and map existing evidence, not to systematically assess the effectiveness or quality of interventions.

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT (N=24) found that eight weeks of visual perturbation training improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors in male athletes who had undergone anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction and returned to sport.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，视觉扰动训练可能有助于 ACL 重建术后男运动员在非预期切入动作中恢复下肢生物力学并减少错误。考虑将其作为传统重返运动方案的补充。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后男运动员8周视觉扰动训练对非预期切入动作下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验（RCT）
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照临床试验（N=24）发现，前交叉韧带重建术后并已重返运动的男运动员，在接受8周视觉扰动训练后，其非预期切入动作的下肢生物力学得到改善，错误减少。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that visual perturbation training may help male athletes after ACL reconstruction restore lower-limb biomechanics and reduce errors during unanticipated cutting maneuvers. Consider it as a supplement to traditional return-to-sport protocols.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（24名男性运动员），且仅限于男性，结果可能不适用于女性运动员或其他年龄段人群。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size (24 male athletes) and was limited to males, so the results may not apply to female athletes or other age groups.

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: The DOPSknee tool showed good on-site inter-rater reliability and validity for assessing physical therapy students' knee joint mobilization skills, with preliminary evidence for its applicability in off-site settings.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究验证了 DOPSknee 工具在物理治疗教育中评估学生膝关节松动术临床能力的可行性和良好信效度，尤其是在远程评估场景下。这对 PT 教育的临床技能评估尤其有意义。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗教育中膝关节松动术程序技能直接观察（DOPS）工具现场与远程应用的信效度研究
items.summaryZh: DOPSknee 工具在物理治疗教育中，对学生膝关节松动术的现场与远程评估显示出良好的信效度，支持其作为临床能力评估工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study validates the DOPSknee tool for assessing PT students' clinical competence in knee mobilization, particularly in remote settings, which is significant for clinical skills assessment in PT education.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（42名学生），且仅评估了膝关节松动术一项技能，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size (42 students) and assessed only one skill (knee mobilization), limiting generalizability.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: This feasibility trial explored the TRAK MSK digital physiotherapy supported self-management program for musculoskeletal pain, randomizing participants to either the digital intervention or usual NHS physiotherapy care over 16 weeks, aiming to assess the feasibility of a definitive trial.
items.curatedReason: TRAK MSK 数字自我管理项目是一项重要的概念验证，提示数字疗法在肌肉骨骼疼痛管理中的潜力。等待其确证性试验的结果，再考虑引入临床路径。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持自我管理项目的随机外部可行性试验和过程评估
items.summaryZh: TRAK MSK 数字物理治疗自我管理项目进行了一项随机外部可行性试验，旨在探索其用于肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的确定性试验的可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The TRAK MSK digital self-management program is an important proof-of-concept, indicating the potential of digital therapeutics in musculoskeletal pain management. Await definitive trial results before considering clinical integration.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性研究，样本量有限，主要目标是评估试验的可行性而非干预的疗效，无法得出确切的临床疗效结论。
items.limitationEn: This was a feasibility study with a limited sample size, primarily assessing trial feasibility rather than intervention efficacy, thus definitive clinical efficacy conclusions cannot be drawn.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: A survey among Swedish physiotherapists revealed major discrepancies in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions after knee replacement, highlighting a lack of consistent evidence-based guidance.
items.curatedReason: 瑞典物理治疗师对膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议差异巨大。这提醒你，即使是常规术后康复，指南也存在真空，要与患者充分沟通并谨慎提供个性化建议。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在重大分歧：一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查显示，膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议存在显著差异，表明缺乏一致的循证指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: Swedish physiotherapists show significant discrepancies in long-term activity restriction recommendations post-knee replacement. This highlights guideline gaps in routine post-op rehab; ensure thorough patient communication and cautious, individualized advice.
items.limitation: 研究是基于瑞典物理治疗师的自我报告调查，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚，不一定完全反映实际临床实践。
items.limitationEn: The study relies on self-reported survey data from Swedish physiotherapists, which may be subject to recall and reporting bias, and may not fully reflect actual clinical practice.

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: A qualitative evidence synthesis of 22 studies, involving 645 informants, identified significant psychological and social impacts of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke, extending beyond physical impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项高质量证据合成深入揭示了卒中后吞咽困难对患者心理社会影响的广度和深度。你在制定康复计划时，除了生理功能外，也必须重视并解决这些情感和社会参与障碍。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难的心理社会影响：一项定性证据合成
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 22 项研究、涉及 645 名受访者的定性证据合成发现，卒中后吞咽困难除了生理障碍外，还会产生显著的心理和社会影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This high-quality evidence synthesis deeply reveals the breadth and depth of psychosocial impacts of post-stroke eating and drinking difficulties. When developing rehabilitation plans, you must not only focus on physiological function but also address these emotional and social participation barriers.
items.limitation: 本综述纳入的原始研究异质性可能影响结果的综合解释。
items.limitationEn: The heterogeneity of the included primary studies may affect the integrated interpretation of the results.

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: This prospective observational study, involving 60 patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, found high relative reliability (ICC values 0.82-0.91) for digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold assessment at local and remote sites.
items.curatedReason: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者的压痛阈（PPT）测量中显示出高信度。你可以在临床评估膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛敏感性时，放心使用这种工具。
items.titleZh: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者中压痛阈测量信度研究：一项单中心信度研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究涵盖了 60 名终末期膝骨关节炎患者，发现数字测痛仪在局部和远端部位的压痛阈测量具有较高的相对信度（ICC 值为 0.82-0.91）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold (PPT) measurements demonstrate high reliability in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis. You can confidently use this tool for assessing pain sensitivity in KOA patients in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于终末期膝骨关节炎患者，结果外推到其他疼痛人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, so generalizing the results to other pain populations should be done with caution.

items.title: Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease: rehabilitation and fitness professionals' experiences to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery - a qualitative interview study.
items.summary: A qualitative interview study with 10 rehabilitation and fitness professionals explored their experiences delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease, identifying themes related to current practices and standards.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了康复和健身专业人员在为帕金森病患者提供在线团体运动时的经验和挑战。这些见解对于优化远程康复服务、确保质量和可及性至关重要。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者的在线团体运动：康复和健身专业人员的经验，以指导物理治疗实践和服务提供——一项定性访谈研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 10 名康复和健身专业人员的定性访谈研究，探讨了他们在为帕金森病患者提供在线团体运动时的经验，并确定了与当前实践和标准相关的主题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals the experiences and challenges of rehabilitation and fitness professionals in delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease. These insights are crucial for optimizing telerehabilitation services, ensuring quality and accessibility.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量较小（10 人），结果主要反映受访者的主观经验，不具普遍推论性。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (10 participants), and the results primarily reflect the subjective experiences of the interviewees, lacking generalizability.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae electromyographic (EMG) activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) and healthy controls, also examining bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后单腿跳跃任务中，小腿三头肌的肌电活动可能与健康对照组存在差异。这提示你在康复训练中，应特别关注小腿三头肌的功能恢复，以降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中小腿三头肌的神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中小腿三头肌的肌电活动，并检查了 ACLR 组内的双侧差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: In single-leg jumping tasks after ACL reconstruction, triceps surae EMG activity may differ from healthy controls. This suggests that you should pay particular attention to triceps surae functional recovery during rehabilitation to reduce re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法建立因果关系，且 EMG 数据可能受多种因素影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, unable to establish causality, and EMG data may be influenced by multiple factors.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 patients from the NACOX Cohort identified three main categories—motivation and driving forces, treatment and recovery, and medical clearance and readiness—determining patients' decisions to return to sport after an ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入分析了 ACL 损伤患者重返运动决策的心理、努力和支持因素。在指导患者 RTS 时，你不仅要评估生理指标，更要理解并支持他们的心理状态和外部支持系统。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持——前交叉韧带损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 NACOX 队列中 112 名患者进行的定性分析确定了驱动力与动机、治疗与恢复、以及医疗许可与准备这三个主要类别，这些因素决定了 ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决策。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study deeply analyzes the mindset, effort, and support factors influencing ACL injury patients' return-to-sport decisions. When guiding patients to RTS, you must not only assess physiological indicators but also understand and support their psychological state and external support systems.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，结果基于患者自由文本回答，可能存在信息遗漏和解释偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative analysis, and the results are based on patients' free-text answers, which may have information omissions and interpretation bias.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of physical therapists treating pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury explored factors affecting clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) use and exercise prescription.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查揭示了物理治疗师在 ACL 损伤儿童和青少年患者中使用血流限制训练（BFRT）时的临床决策影响因素。它有助于你了解 BFRT 在儿科 PT 实践中的实际应用现状及其与研究的一致性。
items.titleZh: 影响儿童和青少年前交叉韧带损伤患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项针对治疗 ACL 损伤后儿童和青少年患者的物理治疗师的横断面调查，探讨了影响血流限制训练（BFRT）使用和运动处方临床决策的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey reveals factors influencing physical therapists' clinical decisions when using blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients with ACL injuries. It helps you understand the current practical application of BFRT in pediatric PT and its concordance with research.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖于物理治疗师的自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey, relying on physical therapists' self-reports, which may involve recall and reporting bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis who had upper extremity fractures, focusing on their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling (FoF) on daily life, and their views on rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深刻揭示了骨质疏松性上肢脆性骨折老年患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法和需求。在制定这类患者的康复计划时，你必须把跌倒恐惧和心理支持作为核心要素，而不仅仅是骨折的机械愈合。
items.titleZh: 骨质疏松性上肢脆性骨折老年患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法和需求
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了骨质疏松性上肢脆性骨折老年患者的观点，重点关注他们的健康问题、跌倒及跌倒恐惧（FoF）对日常生活的影响以及他们对康复的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study profoundly reveals the perspectives and needs of older adults with osteoporotic upper extremity fragility fractures regarding fall risk and fear of falling. When developing rehabilitation plans for these patients, you must prioritize fear of falling and psychological support as core elements, not just mechanical fracture healing.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量较小，结果主要反映受访者的主观经验，不具普遍推论性。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size, and the results primarily reflect the subjective experiences of the interviewees, lacking generalizability.

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind randomized controlled trial with 28 recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability found dynamic taping to be as effective as sports taping in improving dynamic balance and proprioception immediately post-application.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，动态贴扎在改善慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）患者的动态平衡和本体感觉方面，可能与传统运动贴扎效果相当。对于寻求不限制运动的辅助支持的 CAI 患者，可以考虑使用动态贴扎。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 28 名慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员的单盲随机对照试验发现，动态贴扎在应用后即刻改善动态平衡和本体感觉方面，与运动贴扎效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that dynamic taping may be as effective as traditional sports taping in improving dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with chronic ankle instability (CAI). For CAI patients seeking auxiliary support without restricting movement, dynamic taping can be considered.
items.limitation: 本研究为单盲随机对照试验，样本量较小（28 人），随访期短（即时效应），长期效果尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-blind randomized controlled trial with a small sample size (28 participants) and short follow-up (immediate effects), so long-term effects are unclear.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial with 33 chronic stroke individuals found significant group differences in ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion and balance after six weeks of Kinesio taping with treadmill training, Mulligan taping with treadmill training, or treadmill training alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，Kinesio 贴扎或 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练，可能比单纯跑步机训练更能改善慢性卒中患者的踝关节背屈活动度、平衡和踝关节功能。在治疗慢性卒中患者时，你可以考虑将这些贴扎技术整合到训练方案中。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节功能的生物力学效应：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项对 33 名慢性卒中患者进行的随机对照试验发现，在为期六周的 Kinesio 贴扎结合跑步机训练、Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练或单独跑步机训练后，踝关节背屈被动活动度和平衡方面存在显著的组间差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that Kinesio taping or Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training may improve ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and ankle function more than treadmill training alone in chronic stroke patients. When treating chronic stroke patients, you can consider integrating these taping techniques into training protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（33 人），且结果主要集中在短期效应，长期效果需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (33 participants) and primarily focuses on short-term effects; long-term effects require further research.

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: This pilot randomized clinical trial involving 68 participants found that pragmatic physiotherapy with manual therapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain was feasible and showed preliminary treatment effects on patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步 RCT 表明，对于肩袖相关性肩痛，在常规物理治疗中加入手法治疗是可行的，且可能带来额外的治疗效果。可以将其作为未来更大规模研究的依据。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗结合务实物理治疗对肩袖相关性肩痛的有效性：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这项初步随机临床试验纳入了 68 名受试者，发现手法治疗结合务实物理治疗对肩袖相关性肩痛是可行的，并对患者报告结局显示出初步疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT indicates that incorporating manual therapy into pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain is feasible and may offer additional therapeutic benefits. This can serve as a basis for larger future studies.
items.limitation: 本研究是初步性随机临床试验，样本量相对较小，效应量需在更大规模的 RCT 中进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized clinical trial with a relatively small sample size, and the effect sizes need further validation in larger RCTs.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group of 55 pediatric clinicians in the UK indicated a need and relevance for adapting the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for use in pediatric musculoskeletal services.
items.curatedReason: 英国物理治疗师普遍认为，骨骼肌肉健康问卷（MSK-HQ）有潜力适应儿童和青少年骨骼肌肉护理。这提示未来该工具在儿科 PT 中会有更广应用，值得关注其发展。
items.titleZh: 儿童青少年骨骼肌肉护理中 MSK-HQ 的适应性：一项全国物理治疗师调查和焦点小组的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖英国 55 名儿科临床医师的全国调查和焦点小组研究表明，有必要且适宜将骨骼肌肉健康问卷（MSK-HQ）应用于儿童青少年骨骼肌肉服务。
items.curatedReasonEn: UK physiotherapists generally believe that the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) has potential for adaptation in pediatric musculoskeletal care. This suggests future broader application of the tool in pediatric PT, and its development is worth monitoring.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性调查和焦点小组研究，不涉及干预效果评价，结果仅反映受访者观点。
items.limitationEn: This study is a qualitative survey and focus group study, not evaluating intervention effects, and the results only reflect the perspectives of the respondents.

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapping current evidence on ChatGPT's use in musculoskeletal physiotherapy found studies focused on how the technology was studied, rather than its effectiveness or readiness for clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 该综述梳理了 ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的现有研究，主要集中于技术如何被研究。这表明 AI 工具在 PT 领域尚处于探索阶段，目前以工具研究为主，离临床应用还有距离。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的实用性：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项关于 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中应用的范围综述发现，现有研究主要关注该技术的研究方式，而非其有效性或临床实践准备情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review surveys existing research on ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice, focusing on how the technology has been studied. This indicates that AI tools in PT are still in an exploratory phase, primarily centered on tool research, and are some distance from clinical application.
items.limitation: 此为范围综述，不进行证据的质量评估或有效性评价，仅描绘研究现状。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review that does not critically appraise evidence quality or effectiveness, only mapping the current research landscape.

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: This pilot cross-sectional study of 30 Mexican adults with post-stroke spasticity demonstrated that the cross-culturally adapted Patient-Reported Impact of Spasticity Measure (PRISM-MX) showed good internal consistency (Cronbach's alpha 0.90) and preliminary convergent validity.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX 量表经过跨文化调适，在墨西哥卒中后痉挛患者中展现了良好的内部一致性和初步收敛效度。在墨西哥或类似文化背景下，可以考虑将其作为评估痉挛影响的有效工具。
items.titleZh: PRISM-MX 量表在卒中后痉挛患者中的跨文化调适与初步心理测量学评估（墨西哥样本）
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 30 名墨西哥卒中后痉挛成年患者的初步横断面研究表明，经过跨文化调适的痉挛患者自评影响量表（PRISM-MX）具有良好的内部一致性（Cronbach's alpha 0.90）和初步收敛效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PRISM-MX scale, after cross-cultural adaptation, demonstrates good internal consistency and preliminary convergent validity in Mexican stroke patients with spasticity. You can consider it an effective tool for assessing spasticity impact in Mexico or similar cultural contexts.
items.limitation: 本研究为初步横断面研究，样本量较小（30 人），仅提供了初步的心理测量学证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary cross-sectional study with a small sample size (30 participants), providing only preliminary psychometric evidence.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% of 94 children with cerebral palsy (aged 3-60 months) accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and showed good adherence (≥50% of sessions).
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆的研究表明，脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性普遍不足。这提醒你，在低资源环境下，不仅要提供服务，更要关注患者家庭的早期可及性与长期依从性支持。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗可及性和依从性：一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 喀麦隆的一项横断面研究发现，在 94 名脑瘫儿童（3-60 个月）中，只有 38.3% 的儿童早期（5 个月前）接受了物理治疗，并且表现出良好的依从性（≥50% 的治疗次数）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study from Cameroon indicates that early access and adherence to physiotherapy are generally insufficient in children with cerebral palsy. This reminds you that in low-resource settings, it's crucial not only to provide services but also to focus on supporting early accessibility and long-term adherence for patients' families.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心横断面研究，结果可能不适用于其他地区或更高资源环境。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center cross-sectional study, and the results may not be applicable to other regions or higher-resource settings.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined 6 pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention (FOA) when delivering instructions and feedback during telehealth sessions for 12 children with neurodevelopmental disorders.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究通过直接观察，揭示了儿科物理治疗师在远程治疗中如何使用注意力焦点（FOA）进行指令和反馈。这有助于你优化远程治疗沟通策略，提升运动学习效果。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点在指令和反馈中的应用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究调查了 6 名儿科物理治疗师在远程治疗中，如何对 12 名患有神经发育障碍的儿童使用注意力焦点（FOA）进行指令和反馈。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study, through direct observation, reveals how pediatric physical therapists use focus of attention (FOA) for instructions and feedback during telehealth. This helps you optimize telehealth communication strategies and enhance motor learning outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为探索性观察研究，样本量较小（6 名治疗师，12 名儿童），结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory observational study with a small sample size (6 therapists, 12 children), and the generalizability of the results is limited.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: This study validated the PREEMPT activity monitor in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients, demonstrating its accuracy and validity by comparing its stride length, steps, stepping time, sedentary time, and activity time data against video truth data.
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 活动监测仪在急性护理患者中显示出良好的有效性和可用性。你可以考虑将其应用于住院患者的活动量评估，为康复方案的制定提供客观数据。
items.titleZh: 验证用于急性护理患者的活动监测仪：患者/居民移动追踪器（PREEMPT）
items.summaryZh: 本研究在 10 名健康老年人和 46 名住院患者中验证了 PREEMPT 活动监测仪，通过将其步长、步数、行走时间、久坐时间和活动时间数据与视频真实数据进行比较，证明了其准确性和有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor demonstrates good validity and usability in acute care patients. You can consider using it for assessing activity levels in hospitalized patients to provide objective data for rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 本研究健康老年人样本量较小，且受试者主要来自急性护理环境，结果在其他群体中需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: The sample size of healthy older adults in this study was small, and participants were primarily from acute care settings, so the results need further validation in other populations.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded randomized controlled trial found that 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation was safe but not superior to a single session of in-person assessment and advice for improving health-related quality of life in adult cancer survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证据表明，基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但在改善癌症幸存者生活质量方面，与单次线下物理治疗评估和建议相比并无优势。你在推广远程康复时，要清晰告知患者其对生活质量的预期，并考虑成本效益。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但与单次物理治疗相比，在改善生活质量方面无优势：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者设盲的随机对照试验发现，为期 8 周的基于运动的团体远程康复是安全的，但与单次线下评估和建议相比，在改善成人癌症幸存者健康相关生活质量方面并无优势。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evidence indicates that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single in-person physiotherapy assessment and advice session for improving quality of life in cancer survivors. When promoting telerehabilitation, you must clearly inform patients about quality of life expectations and consider cost-effectiveness.
items.limitation: 本研究将远程康复与单次线下咨询进行比较，对照组干预强度较低，可能影响结果的解读。
items.limitationEn: This study compared telerehabilitation with a single in-person consultation, where the control group's intervention intensity was low, which might affect the interpretation of the results.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: This case report describes the clinical course of a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability, where figure-of-eight taping effectively facilitated exercise therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这篇病例报告提示，八字贴扎技术可能通过促进康复训练，帮助学龄空手道运动员改善多方向肩关节不稳（MDI）。它提供了一个处理 MDI 的辅助思路。
items.titleZh: 八字贴扎结合康复训练治疗学龄空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳：病例报告
items.summaryZh: 这篇病例报告描述了一名 12 岁女性空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳的临床过程，八字贴扎有效促进了运动疗法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report suggests that figure-of-eight taping may facilitate rehabilitation exercises, helping school-age karate athletes with multidirectional shoulder instability (MDI). It offers an adjunctive approach for managing MDI.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，结论外推性非常有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, so the generalizability of the findings is very limited.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) led to greater muscle strength gains (SMD=0.48, 95% CI 0.32 to 0.65) and pain reduction (SMD=-0.50, 95% CI -0.76 to -0.24) compared to low-load exercise (LLE) alone, with similar effects on muscle strength compared to high-load exercise (HLE) (SMD= -0.05, 95% CI -0.16 to 0.05).
items.curatedReason: 关于血流限制训练（BFR）与常规训练在肌肉骨骼康复中的对比，这篇综述指出，BFR在提升肌肉力量和减少疼痛方面可能优于低负荷训练（LLE），且与高负荷训练（HLE）效果相似。考虑将BFR作为LLE的强化选项，尤其是在HLE不适用的情况下。
items.titleZh: 血流限制训练在肌肉骨骼康复中是否比传统训练有额外益处？一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项RCTs的系统综述和Meta分析发现，低负荷血流限制训练（LLE-BFR）在肌肉骨骼疾病患者中，相比单独低负荷训练（LLE）能带来更大的肌肉力量提升（SMD=0.48）和疼痛减轻（SMD=-0.50），且与高负荷训练（HLE）在肌肉力量方面效果相似（SMD=-0.05）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review on blood flow restriction (BFR) training vs. conventional exercise in MSK rehab indicates BFR may be superior to low-load exercise (LLE) for muscle strength and pain reduction, and similar to high-load exercise (HLE). Consider BFR as an enhanced option over LLE, especially when HLE is contraindicated.
items.limitation: 原始研究的异质性较高。
items.limitationEn: The original studies exhibit high heterogeneity.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=105) compared agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions between physiotherapists and resident physicians against senior physicians for non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions in an emergency department. The study found high agreement, supporting Advanced Physiotherapy Practice (APP) roles.
items.curatedReason: 本研究支持高级物理治疗实践（APP）模式在急诊科诊断和治疗非紧急肌肉骨骼疾病中的有效性。若你在考虑拓展执业范围或推进PT在急诊分诊中的作用，这项研究提供了有力的支持证据。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍的诊断和治疗一线协议：一项前瞻性、随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=105）在急诊科对非紧急肌肉骨骼疾病的诊断、治疗和出院决策中，比较了物理治疗师和住院医师与资深医师的一致性。研究发现高度一致，支持高级物理治疗实践（APP）模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study supports the effectiveness of Advanced Physiotherapy Practice (APP) roles in diagnosing and treating non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions in emergency departments. If you are considering expanding your scope of practice or advocating for PTs in ED triage, this study offers strong supporting evidence.
items.limitation: 研究在单一医院的急诊科进行，外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted in a single hospital ED, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: Researchers developed a core set of 9 patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy, grouped into three domains: functioning (physical, emotional, social), health status, and symptoms (pain, fatigue, sleep). This set is suitable for daily practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.curatedReason: 这份报告为儿科物理治疗制定了核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs）。如果你在儿科实践中需要标准化评估工具，这份核心集能帮你规范临床实践和研究，并为疗效评估提供依据。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 研究人员为儿科物理治疗开发了一套包含9个核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其相应测量工具（PROMs）的集合，分为三个领域：功能（身体、情绪、社交）、健康状况和症状（疼痛、疲劳、睡眠）。该集合适用于日常实践、研究和质量评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report establishes a core set of patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy. If you require standardized assessment tools in your pediatric practice, this core set can help standardize clinical practice, research, and provide a basis for efficacy evaluation.
items.limitation: 核心集的开发依赖于专家组和调查，可能存在主观性。
items.limitationEn: The development of the core set relied on expert panels and surveys, which may introduce subjectivity.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: APTA Report Finds Demand for Pelvic Health Physical Therapy Outpaces Access | APTA
items.summary: A new APTA report, "APTA State of Pelvic Health Physical Therapy," reveals that demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. significantly outpaces access, identifying key challenges in workforce, access, and awareness.
items.curatedReason: APTA的报告揭示了美国盆底健康物理治疗供不应求的现状，并指出了劳动力、可及性和意识方面的挑战。如果你从事盆底健康PT，这证实了你的专业需求，并为你争取执业范围扩大或政策支持提供了依据。
items.titleZh: APTA报告：盆底健康物理治疗需求超出美国可及性
items.summaryZh: APTA新报告《APTA盆底健康物理治疗现状》显示，美国盆底健康物理治疗的需求显著超出可及性，指出了劳动力、可及性和意识方面的主要挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: APTA's report highlights the unmet demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S., identifying workforce, access, and awareness challenges. If you are in pelvic health PT, this affirms the demand for your specialty and provides grounds to advocate for expanded scope of practice or policy support.

items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the impact of postpartum exercise on pelvic floor disorders and diastasis recti abdominis. It found that exercise positively influences the recovery and prevention of these conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析强调了产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的积极影响。在为产后女性制定康复计划时，将其作为核心干预措施，并确保方案的证据基础。
items.titleZh: 产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析评估了产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响。研究发现运动对这些疾病的恢复和预防有积极作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights the positive impact of postpartum exercise on pelvic floor disorders and diastasis recti abdominis. Incorporate it as a core intervention when developing rehabilitation plans for postpartum women, ensuring evidence-based protocols.
items.limitation: 部分研究可能存在方法学异质性，影响结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: Some included studies may have methodological heterogeneity, affecting generalizability.

items.title: Consensus practice guidelines on interventions for cervical spine ...
items.summary: A multispecialty international working group developed consensus practice guidelines on interventions for cervical spine (facet) joint pain, providing updated recommendations for clinicians.
items.curatedReason: 这是一份关于颈椎关节痛干预措施的共识实践指南。如果你在处理颈椎相关疼痛病例，这份多学科国际共识能为你的评估和治疗选择提供标准化参考。
items.titleZh: 颈椎（小关节）关节痛干预措施的共识实践指南
items.summaryZh: 一个多学科国际工作组制定了关于颈椎（小关节）关节痛干预措施的共识实践指南，为临床医生提供了更新的建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a consensus practice guideline on interventions for cervical spine facet joint pain. If you manage cervical spine-related pain cases, this multispecialty international consensus can provide a standardized reference for your assessment and treatment choices.

items.title: A Multicenter Randomized Pragmatic Trial Comparing Intra-Articular Injection, Genicular Nerve Block, and Radiofrequency Ablation for Knee Osteoarthritis Pain: SKOAP Phase 2 Protocol
items.summary: The SKOAP Phase 2 Protocol describes a multicenter randomized pragmatic trial comparing intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain, aiming to address limited comparative evidence for procedural interventions.
items.curatedReason: 这份SKOAP Phase 2协议描述了一项多中心随机试验，比较了膝骨关节炎疼痛的关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术。如果你在处理膝骨关节炎患者，这项研究的进展将影响你对介入治疗的转诊决策。
items.titleZh: 多中心随机实用试验比较膝骨关节炎疼痛的关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术：SKOAP 2期方案
items.summaryZh: SKOAP 2期方案描述了一项多中心随机实用试验，旨在比较膝骨关节炎疼痛的关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术，以解决介入治疗比较证据有限的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This SKOAP Phase 2 protocol describes a multicenter randomized trial comparing intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain. If you manage knee OA patients, the progress of this study will influence your referral decisions for interventional treatments.

items.title: Use of Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy for the Management of Bone Pathologies: A Systematic Review
items.summary: A systematic review of 3 databases (Cochrane, Embase, PubMed) evaluated the efficacy of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) for bone pathologies, including fractures, osteonecrosis/avascular necrosis, bone stress injury, medial tibial stress syndrome, and bone marrow edema syndrome, across various study designs.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述评估了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）在骨病理学管理中的疗效，包括骨折、骨坏死和应力性损伤。如果你在处理这类骨科病例，可以参考其在这些特定病症中的应用证据。
items.titleZh: 体外冲击波疗法在骨病理学管理中的应用：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项对3个数据库进行的系统综述评估了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）在骨病理学管理中的疗效，包括骨折、骨坏死/缺血性坏死、骨应力损伤、胫骨内侧应力综合征和骨髓水肿综合征，涵盖了多种研究设计。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review evaluates the efficacy of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) in managing bone pathologies, including fractures, osteonecrosis, and stress injuries. If you are handling such orthopedic cases, you can refer to its evidence for application in these specific conditions.
items.limitation: 综述纳入的研究设计多样（包括RCT、队列、病例报告），证据等级存在异质性。
items.limitationEn: The review includes diverse study designs (RCTs, cohort, case reports), leading to heterogeneity in evidence levels.

items.title: Comparative Outcomes of Circumferential Versus Segmental Labral Reconstruction in Hip Arthroscopy: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis compared patient-reported outcomes, complications, and reoperation rates between segmental and circumferential labral reconstruction in hip arthroscopy. The study aims to clarify which technique offers superior clinical outcomes for irreparable acetabular labral pathology.
items.curatedReason: 这项Meta分析比较了髋关节镜下盂唇环形与节段性重建的结局。如果你在评估髋关节盂唇损伤患者的术式选择，该研究为你提供了不同重建技术的疗效、并发症和再手术率的对比证据，有助于你与患者和骨科医生沟通。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜下环形与节段性盂唇重建的比较结局：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析比较了髋关节镜下节段性与环形盂唇重建的患者报告结局、并发症和再手术率。该研究旨在明确哪种技术对不可修复的髋臼盂唇病理提供更优的临床结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis compares outcomes of circumferential vs. segmental labral reconstruction in hip arthroscopy. If you are evaluating surgical options for hip labral tears, this study provides comparative evidence on efficacy, complications, and reoperation rates for different reconstruction techniques, aiding communication with patients and orthopedic surgeons.
items.limitation: 纳入研究可能存在异质性，影响结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The included studies may exhibit heterogeneity, affecting the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Rehabilitation of Long-Standing Groin Pain in Athletes: A Scoping Review of Exercise Content and Reporting | Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A scoping review systematically summarized the exercise content and reporting in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes, identifying key exercise components and reporting practices across the literature.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述系统地总结了运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容和报告。如果你在处理运动性腹股沟痛，这份综述可以帮你了解当前证据支持的运动干预类型，从而优化你的康复方案。
items.titleZh: 运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛的康复：运动内容与报告的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述系统总结了运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容和报告，识别了文献中关键的运动组成部分和报告实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically summarizes exercise content and reporting in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes. If you manage sports-related groin pain, this review can help you understand the types of exercise interventions supported by current evidence, thereby optimizing your rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 范围综述旨在映射文献，而非评估证据质量，因此不能直接作为高等级证据指导临床实践。
items.limitationEn: A scoping review aims to map the literature rather than assess evidence quality, thus it cannot directly guide clinical practice as high-level evidence.

items.title: Hip Arthroscopic Labral Repair for Femoroacetabular Impingement Yields High Return-to-Sport Rates and Improved Outcomes in Basketball Players
items.summary: A study evaluating 2009-2022 data found that hip arthroscopic labral repair for femoroacetabular impingement in active basketball players resulted in high return-to-sport rates (87%) and improved patient-reported outcome measures (mHHS 87.2, HOS-ADL 94.6, HOS-SS 89.2) at a minimum 2-year follow-up.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，髋关节镜下盂唇修复术能使篮球运动员获得较高的重返运动率和改善的患者报告结局。如果你在为有髋关节撞击症状的篮球运动员制定术后康复计划，这为你提供了积极的预后信息，指导你设定重返运动目标。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜下盂唇修复术治疗股骨髋臼撞击使篮球运动员获得高重返运动率和改善的结局
items.summaryZh: 一项评估2009-2022年数据的研究发现，对患有股骨髋臼撞击的活跃篮球运动员进行髋关节镜下盂唇修复术，在至少2年的随访中，取得了高重返运动率（87%）和改善的患者报告结局（mHHS 87.2，HOS-ADL 94.6，HOS-SS 89.2）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that hip arthroscopic labral repair yields high return-to-sport rates and improved patient-reported outcomes in basketball players. If you are developing a post-operative rehabilitation plan for basketball players with hip impingement, this provides positive prognostic information to guide your return-to-sport goals.
items.limitation: 研究是回顾性队列研究，且仅限于篮球运动员，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study is a retrospective cohort study and limited to basketball players, thus generalizability is limited.

items.title: Treadmill training with rhythmic auditory cueing and/or visual feedback for persons with Multiple Sclerosis: feasibility and effects on gait parameters in a clinical randomized controlled trial | medRxiv
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial evaluated the feasibility and effects of treadmill training (TT) with visual feedback (VF) and TT with VF plus rhythmic auditory cueing (RAC) on gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis. Both interventions were found feasible and showed positive effects on gait.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，带有视觉反馈和/或节律听觉提示的跑台训练在多发性硬化症患者的步态参数改善上是可行的。这为神经康复中的步态训练提供了新的技术辅助方向，你可以考虑在临床实践中探索其应用。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症患者采用节律听觉提示和/或视觉反馈的跑台训练：临床随机对照试验的可行性及对步态参数的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验评估了带有视觉反馈（VF）和VF加节律听觉提示（RAC）的跑台训练在多发性硬化症患者中对步态参数的可行性及效果。研究发现两种干预措施均可行，并对步态产生积极影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing is feasible and effective for improving gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis. This offers new technology-assisted directions for gait training in neurorehabilitation; consider exploring its application in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的可行性研究，样本量较小，长期效果和更大规模验证仍需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary feasibility study with a small sample size; long-term effects and larger-scale validation require further research.

items.title: Digital Simulation-Based Ultrasound Training for Physiotherapy Students: Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A prospective randomized blinded study (N=68 physiotherapy students) found that a simulation-based online ultrasound platform was as effective as traditional on-site training for physiotherapy students, with both groups completing identical theoretical and practical assessments.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，数字模拟超声训练平台与传统现场教学对物理治疗学生的教学效果相当。如果你在考虑引入远程或数字化教学工具，这项研究支持其在超声教育中的应用潜力。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗学生数字模拟超声训练：前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机盲法研究（N=68名物理治疗学生）发现，数字模拟在线超声训练平台与传统现场教学对物理治疗学生同样有效，两组均完成了相同的理论和实践评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that digital simulation-based ultrasound training is as effective as traditional on-site instruction for physiotherapy students. If you are considering integrating remote or digital teaching tools, this research supports its potential application in ultrasound education.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是学生学习效果，而非临床操作技能的长期转移和患者结局。
